name: Cajun Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mayonnaise and mustard in a large bowl.
2. Beat the mixture until well combined.
3. Slowly add olive oil while continuously beating to achieve a thickness similar to original mayonnaise.
4. Add Louisiana hot sauce and continue beating.
5. Incorporate ketchup by beating thoroughly.
6. Add salt and garlic salt, continuing to beat.
7. Stir in wine vinegar, ensuring it is well mixed; then add lemon juice.
8. Taste for saltiness and adjust pepper level as desired.
9. In a large salad bowl, mix shredded cabbage, peppers, and onions.
10. Pour the prepared sauce over the vegetables and toss well.
11. Allow the coleslaw to marinate for at least one hour before serving; it improves flavor the next day.
